content.body:
Enable token/cost data capture (tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_usd, model)
in metric docs so cost can be cross-referenced with quality metrics to
evaluate architectural changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(kb): add session cost tracking to metric schema and wrap-up workflow
